summary: Completed iteration 2 testing focusing on new features: transaction history endpoint, credits page auth protection, and Mermaid diagrams. Fixed critical frontend JavaScript bug in Credits component.

ui_bugs.issue: Mermaid diagrams not rendering in existing reports despite enhanced prompt

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/stats returns valid response (total_reports: 3, total_users: 3)
Backend GET /api/reports returns 3 existing reports correctly
Backend POST /api/reports/check validates URLs and returns exists/not exists
Backend GET /api/user/transactions endpoint exists and requires auth (401 when unauthorized)
Frontend landing page loads with URL input and Analyze button
Frontend auth page loads with login/signup tabs
Frontend browse page shows 3 existing reports
Frontend credits page correctly redirects to auth when not authenticated
Frontend navigation between pages works correctly
Frontend report view page renders markdown content with proper formatting
Fixed setSearchParams bug in Credits component - frontend runtime errors resolved
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Investigate why Mermaid diagrams are not rendering in existing reports despite enhanced prompt - may need to regenerate reports with new Mermaid-enabled prompt. 2. Test dashboard transaction history functionality with authenticated user to verify it displays payment and credit transactions correctly.
